quickStartGuide.title: Quick Start Guide
quickStartGuide.subtitle: Learn how PitchAssess works
quickStartGuide.uploadDesc: Start by uploading your pitch deck (PDF), audio recording, or video presentation. We support multiple formats for your convenience.
quickStartGuide.configureDesc: Select your technology domain and target audience type. This helps our AI provide context-aware feedback tailored to your specific needs.
quickStartGuide.aiAnalysisDesc: Our advanced AI analyzes your pitch across multiple dimensions including structure, content, delivery, and audience fit.
quickStartGuide.feedbackDesc: Receive comprehensive feedback with strengths, improvement areas, actionable recommendations, and a detailed scoring breakdown.

contextualHints.gettingStartedDesc: Upload your pitch and select a technology domain and target audience to receive tailored guidance for your assessment.
contextualHints.biotechDesc: Emphasize clinical validation, regulatory pathways, and intellectual property. Reviewers will look for clear science-to-market translation.
contextualHints.photonicsDesc: Highlight technical performance metrics, manufacturing scalability, and target application markets.
contextualHints.electronicsDesc: Demonstrate hardware-software integration, supply-chain readiness, and clear product differentiation.
contextualHints.medtechDesc: Address clinical evidence, reimbursement strategy, and regulatory clearance pathways for your target geographies.
contextualHints.deeptechDesc: Show technology readiness level, defensibility, and a credible path from research to commercial deployment.
contextualHints.startupContestDesc: Lead with a compelling story, a sharp problem statement, and a memorable hook. Judges score on clarity and impact within tight time limits.
contextualHints.techTransferDesc: Focus on IP position, licensing opportunities, and concrete steps from lab to market with realistic timelines.
contextualHints.fundingAgencyDesc: Align with program objectives, articulate societal impact, and present a robust work plan with measurable milestones.
contextualHints.ventureCapitalDesc: Show large market opportunity, defensible moat, capital efficiency, and a credible plan to a venture-scale outcome.
contextualHints.investorDesc: Demonstrate traction, unit economics, and a clear use of funds tied to value-creating milestones.
contextualHints.customerDesc: Articulate the pain point, quantified value delivered, and how your solution fits into existing workflows or systems.

recentAssessments.noPreviousDesc: Upload your first pitch to get started with AI-powered feedback

fileUpload.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop your pitch deck or recording here, or click to browse
fileUpload.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload PDF, MP3, WAV, M4A, or MP4 files.

brandingFooter.poweredBy: Powered by Interreg Baltic Sea Region

educationalCards.learnEffectivePitch: Learn what makes an effective deep-tech pitch while we analyze yours
educationalCards.problemDefinitionDesc: Strong pitches begin with a clear, compelling problem statement. For deep-tech ventures, articulate the technical challenge and its real-world impact with specific data points.
educationalCards.solutionInnovationDesc: Venture capitalists evaluate the novelty and defensibility of your technology. Highlight unique technical advantages, intellectual property, and barriers to entry.
educationalCards.marketOpportunityDesc: Deep-tech investors need evidence of market demand. Include total addressable market (TAM), serviceable addressable market (SAM), and early customer validation.
educationalCards.teamCredibilityDesc: For biotechnology ventures, emphasize scientific credentials, relevant industry experience, and advisory board expertise. Technical founders should demonstrate business acumen.
educationalCards.tractionMilestonesDesc: Early-stage deep-tech pitches should showcase development progress: proof-of-concept results, pilot programs, partnerships, or regulatory milestones achieved.
educationalCards.financialProjectionsDesc: Venture capitalists scrutinize financial models. Ensure projections are grounded in realistic assumptions, with clear paths to revenue and defensible unit economics.
educationalCards.competitiveLandscapeDesc: Demonstrate deep understanding of competitors and alternatives. Position your technology within the ecosystem and articulate sustainable competitive advantages.
educationalCards.callToActionDesc: End with a specific ask: funding amount, use of funds, and expected outcomes. For VC pitches, align the ask with typical investment stages and fund thesis.

exportShare.title: Export & Share Your Results
exportShare.description: Download a comprehensive PDF report or share with your team

detailedScores.title: Detailed Section Scores
detailedScores.problemDefinitionDesc: Clarity and relevance of problem statement

scoringScale.weakDesc: Information is missing, contradictory, or extremely poorly articulated
scoringScale.averageDesc: Information is present but lacks depth, evidence, or clear differentiation
scoringScale.strongDesc: Professional, well-evidenced, and compelling. Meets industry standards
scoringScale.exceptionalDesc: Best-in-class articulation. Clear competitive moat and flawless narrative

feedbackExamples.clearProblemDefinitionDesc: The problem the venture addresses is clearly outlined, making the urgency and potential impact understandable.
feedbackExamples.clearProblemDefinitionNarrative: The pitch begins with a compelling narrative on the inefficiencies in current filtering technologies, setting the stage effectively.
feedbackExamples.clearProblemDefinitionImpact: Impact: This clarity sets a strong foundation for the rest of the pitch, capturing the audience's interest early on.
feedbackExamples.technicalInnovationSolution: The solution offers a novel approach to sieving, promising significant performance improvements over existing technologies.
feedbackExamples.technicalInnovationDescription: The description of the nanoparticle-based sieving process is both detailed and innovative.
feedbackExamples.technicalInnovationImpact: Impact: Demonstrates the company's technical prowess and potential to disrupt existing market solutions.
feedbackExamples.technicalExplanationConcepts: Complex concepts are broken down adequately, making the technology accessible to non-specialists.
feedbackExamples.technicalExplanationDiagrams: Diagrams accompanied with simple explanations make the technical process clear without oversimplification.
feedbackExamples.technicalExplanationImpact: Impact: Ensures the audience can grasp the solution's sophistication and feasibility without needing a technical background.
feedbackExamples.marketOpportunityAnalysisIssue: The pitch does not include sufficient detail on market size and realistic revenue potential.
feedbackExamples.marketOpportunityAnalysisSuggestionDesc: Incorporate data on market size, growth trends, and competitive landscape to highlight commercial potential.
feedbackExamples.marketOpportunityAnalysisExampleDesc: Include graphs or statistics on the filtration industry size and trends.
feedbackExamples.credibilityValidationIssue: Lacks empirical data or testing results to validate the claims about the technology's effectiveness.
feedbackExamples.credibilityValidationSuggestionDesc: Present results from prototypes or case studies to demonstrate proven benefits and credibility.
feedbackExamples.credibilityValidationExampleDesc: Add sections showing lab test results or third-party validations.
feedbackExamples.callToActionClarityIssue: The next steps for potential investors or partners are vaguely defined.
feedbackExamples.callToActionClaritySuggestionDesc: Clearly articulate the desired engagement or investment opportunity and how they can participate.
feedbackExamples.callToActionClarityExampleDesc: Conclude with a direct statement of what you need from the audience and how they can be involved.

templatePreview.whyThisWorksDesc: This template is optimized based on successful pitch patterns from the BSR DeepTech Launch ecosystem. It balances technical depth with commercial viability, addresses key investor concerns, and follows proven narrative structures that achieve high assessment scores.

templateFilters.searchPlaceholder: Search templates by name or description...

comparisonPanel.comparePerformance: Compare performance across all assessment dimensions

comparison.selectBothPitches: Please select two pitches to compare
comparison.sectionAnalysisDescription: Compare performance across all assessment dimensions

sectionDescriptions.structure: The pitch follows a logical structure with clear sections, aiding quick comprehension of the core concept.
sectionDescriptions.problem: A clear and relevant problem is articulated, demonstrating substantial evidence of its relevance to the target demographic.
sectionDescriptions.solution: The solution is described in a satisfactory manner but lacks detailed explanation of its technological differentiation.
sectionDescriptions.value: The benefits are not clearly quantified or effectively compared against existing solutions, reducing its persuasive impact.
sectionDescriptions.market: Some understanding of market size and competitors is evident, but lacks comprehensive analysis or competitive differentiation.
sectionDescriptions.technology: Basic technical details are provided, but a deeper explanation or technical advantage is missing.
sectionDescriptions.credibility: Limited evidence of traction or partnerships is provided, which affects credibility.
sectionDescriptions.callToAction: The funding ask is presented but lacks detailed use of funds and clear milestones.
sectionDescriptions.language: Professional tone with mostly clear and brief language, although some sections could benefit from condensing.
sectionDescriptions.audienceFit: The pitch only partially aligns with what deeptech customers prioritize, missing detailed ROI or integration paths.

patternInsights.leverageStrengths: Leverage these strengths in future pitches and use them as templates for improving weaker areas.
patternInsights.continueIterating: Continue iterating on these areas with targeted improvements to achieve excellence across all dimensions.
patternInsights.basedOnHistory: Based on your assessment history, we've identified key patterns that can accelerate your pitch development:
patternInsights.strongestPitches: Your strongest pitches combine technical depth with clear market validation
patternInsights.iterationsFocus: Iterations focusing on credibility evidence show 2.1x faster score improvements
patternInsights.domainLanguage: Domain-specific language adaptation correlates with 15% higher audience fit scores
